energy.title: Energy
energy.subtitle: P2P Solar Energy Community

my.not_member: You are not part of any energy cell

empty.title: No energy cells yet
empty.subtitle: Be the first to start a P2P energy community in your neighbourhood.

how.title: How it works
how.step1: A solar producer sells surplus to the group instead of the grid
how.step2: Neighbours receive cheap energy (~0.12 €/kWh incl. network tariff vs 0.20 € from grid)
how.step3: Green light signals when surplus is available — smart devices auto-start
how.step4: Parahub registers the ACC (Autoconsumo Coletivo — collective self-consumption) group with DGEG (Portuguese energy regulator) and manages billing

form.cpe_hint: CPE (Código de Ponto de Entrega) — your delivery point code, found at the top of your electricity bill (e.g. PT0002...)
form.transformer_hint: E-Redes substation ID (format: PT-XXXXXX). Optional — leave blank if unsure.

relay.title: Smart Relays
relay.hint: Plug a Shelly (~€15) into your water heater. It turns on automatically when cheap solar energy is available.
relay.name: Device name

energy.landing_meta: Free open-source platform for sharing solar energy between neighbors — Collective Self-Consumption (DL 15/2022)
energy.landing_hero_title: Sell solar energy to your neighbors — not to the grid
energy.landing_hero_subtitle: Collective Self-Consumption legalized by DL 15/2022. Producer earns 0.08 €/kWh (vs 0.05 € feed-in). Neighbor pays ~0.12 € incl. network tariff (vs 0.20 € grid). 40% savings.
energy.landing_problem_1: Solar surplus sold to grid at 0.05 €/kWh — practically for free
energy.landing_problem_2: Neighbors pay 0.20 €/kWh from grid while solar panels sit next door
energy.landing_problem_3: Setting up an ACC group with DGEG is bureaucratic and inaccessible
energy.landing_feature_1_desc: Sell solar surplus directly to neighbors — 60% more than the grid feed-in tariff
energy.landing_feature_2_desc: Live dashboard with cell status: green (surplus), yellow (balanced), red (no surplus)
energy.landing_feature_3_desc: Smart devices auto-start when surplus energy is available
energy.landing_feature_4_desc: DL 15/2022 and EU Directive 2024/1711 legalize energy sharing. All EU states must implement by July 2026 — we handle DGEG registration
energy.landing_feature_5_desc: See energy cells on the map, find and join nearby energy communities
energy.landing_feature_6_desc: Open-source, no subscription. 1% EGAC management fee — no other costs. Community infrastructure, not a product
energy.landing_how_1: Install solar panels and create an energy cell
energy.landing_how_2: Neighbors within a 2 km radius join your cell
energy.landing_how_3: Parahub handles ACC registration with DGEG and manages billing
energy.eu_note: EU Directive 2024/1711 mandates energy sharing in all member states by July 2026. European Commission estimates €500–1,100/year savings per household.
energy.landing_free_desc: Parahub is civic infrastructure. The energy transition should not cost money.
